detailed_review:
Why Urban Company is the Ultimate Home Services Marketplace

Urban Company has revolutionized the way we access home and personal care services. By bridging the gap between skilled professionals and consumers, it offers an unparalleled level of convenience. Whether you need a relaxing spa session at home, a deep cleaning service, or urgent appliance repairs, Urban Company delivers certified professionals right to your doorstep.

Why Customers Love Urban Company

The platform's success lies in its commitment to quality and safety. Every professional undergoes rigorous background checks and intensive training before they can accept bookings. Moreover, Urban Company uses high-quality, branded products for all its services, ensuring a premium experience. The app also features a robust rating and review system, giving users complete peace of mind.

How to Maximize Your ₹100 Sign-Up Bonus

When you join using our exclusive referral link, you instantly receive a ₹100 voucher. To get the most value out of this bonus, we recommend booking high-demand services like salon therapies, AC servicing, or deep cleaning. Since the voucher is valid for exactly 4 weeks, plan your first booking shortly after downloading the app to ensure you do not miss out on these savings.
steps: Click on the referral link: https://m.urbancompany.com/ImbW/tz2slvwr to download the Urban Company app.
Install the app on your smartphone.
Open the app and register a new account using your mobile number.
Verify your account using the OTP sent to your phone.
Your ₹100 instant voucher will be automatically credited to your account and can be applied during checkout on your first booking.
Ensure you book and complete your service within 4 weeks before the voucher expires.

faq.question: How do I claim the ₹100 Urban Company sign-up bonus?
faq.answer: To claim your ₹100 voucher, you must download the Urban Company app using the referral link (https://m.urbancompany.com/ImbW/tz2slvwr) and register a new account. The voucher will be automatically credited to your profile.

faq.question: How long is the signup voucher valid?
faq.answer: The ₹100 sign-up voucher is valid for 4 weeks (28 days) from the date of registration. Be sure to use it before it expires.

faq.question: Can the voucher be used on any service?
faq.answer: Yes, the voucher can be applied to any trusted service offered on the Urban Company app, including salon services, home cleaning, pest control, and appliance repairs.

faq.question: Is there a minimum booking amount to use the voucher?
faq.answer: Generally, the voucher can be applied to any booking, but specific terms and conditions or minimum cart values may apply depending on the service category and location. Check the voucher details in the 'My Rewards' section of the app.
